photographers.name: Sam Youkilis
photographers.bio: Documentary photographer and filmmaker finding the poetic in everyday rituals — markets, meals, light, and quiet human gestures around the world.

images.title: Dessert tray at Contramar
images.caption: One of the unvaryingly good classics in Roma Norte.

images.title: Xochimilco canals
images.caption: The dewy canals and lively alleyways of Mexico City.

images.title: Market passage
images.caption: Walking around and noticing things — markets, murals, and the rhythm of the street.

images.title: Sunday morning
images.caption: Lagunilla and the city's largest markets — always worth getting up early.

photographers.name: Sam Youkilis
photographers.bio: Documentary photographer and filmmaker finding the poetic in everyday rituals — markets, meals, light, and quiet human gestures around the world.

images.title: West Broadway, Tribeca
images.caption: Photographed from the loading dock of the apartment I grew up in downtown Manhattan.

images.title: Morning window
images.caption: The view from my window every morning before strolling through the streets.

images.title: Street crossing
images.caption: Whatever is happening, I want to document it.

images.title: Downtown crossing
images.caption: Reactive and responsive — framing and composing in seconds.

images.title: Sidewalk moment
images.caption: A discreetly observant eye for quiet and often humorous moments of humanity.

images.title: Strangers in motion
images.caption: Whatever is happening in real time — my work is a response to those things.

images.title: Lower Manhattan corner
images.caption: I leave the house with no other plans but to take pictures.

images.title: Espresso at the counter
images.caption: The fresh cup handed across the counter — light, color, and rich tones.

images.title: Vegetable stand
images.caption: Intensely colorful items displayed at a market stall.

images.title: Afternoon light
images.caption: An alert observer of seemingly trivial situations unfolding before my eyes.

images.title: Street corner
images.caption: Strolling through the streets as an alert observer.

images.title: Passing figures
images.caption: People walking while carrying things — a recurring scene in the archive.

images.title: Piazza bench
images.caption: The casual tenderness of human gestures in a town square.

images.title: Market colors
images.caption: Food, ingredients, and the stories behind how they are made.

photographers.name: Sam Youkilis

images.title: Sidi Kaouki beach
images.caption: A sleepy fishing village — surfers, camels, and fishermen along a semi-deserted beach.

images.title: Atlantic coast
images.caption: Every visit to Essaouira, I make sure to stop in Sidi Kaouki as well.

images.title: Medina alley
images.caption: Wandering the coast and the old city — surfers, fishermen, and quiet corners.

images.title: Nara
images.caption: Mochi-making and other cultural practices captured on the road through Japan.

images.title: Street ritual
images.caption: Small fragments of reality that blur the line between still and moving images.

images.title: Evening crossing
images.caption: Everyday Tokyo — soft light and passing trains.

photographers.name: Sam Youkilis

images.title: Quartieri Spagnoli
images.caption: The lively alleyways of Napoli — dolce vita in its most unvarnished form.

images.title: Street market
images.caption: An older Italy — a generation of Italians and a way of life I am drawn to shoot.

images.title: Evening stroll
images.caption: Clean graphic framing and a penchant for finding the poetic in the mundane.

images.title: Fruit cart vendor
images.caption: I wandered downtown Havana and walked with vendors pushing carts of fruit and flowers.

images.title: Old Havana street
images.caption: Photographing vendors as they made their rounds through the city.

images.title: Colonial corridor
images.caption: Personal work made between assignments — scouting the streets on foot.
